description:

description:

title: Prison health care contract extended amid scrutiny
description:
Despite public scrutiny and complaints from inmates and their attorneys, the Indiana Department of Correction has renewed its contract with its third-party health services provider for up to another year.

title: Surack: Auburn racetrack project ‘dead’ after land deal falls through
description:
The founder of Fort Wayne-based Sweetwater Sound said plans for a new racetrack in Auburn have come to a halt after talks to purchase the land needed for the project ended.

title: Jasper County approves $7B Amazon Web Services data center project
description:
